competency_framework.description: This certification validates foundational skills in using Microsoft 365 Copilot tools to enhance productivity, communication, data analysis, and effective prompting.

domains.name: Productivity
domains.description: Skills related to using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint to enhance productivity.

skills.name: Word Processing with Copilot
skills.description: Using Microsoft 365 Copilot to create, edit, and manage documents in Word.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Understands basic document creation and editing using Copilot in Word.
behavioral_indicators: Can create a new document using Copilot suggestions.
Edits text based on Copilot's grammar and style recommendations.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Efficiently uses Copilot to enhance document formatting and content creation.
behavioral_indicators: Applies Copilot's advanced formatting suggestions to improve document layout.
Incorporates Copilot's content suggestions to enrich document content.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Leverages Copilot to automate complex document tasks and optimize workflow.
behavioral_indicators: Automates repetitive tasks using Copilot's advanced features.
Customizes Copilot's suggestions to fit specific document needs.

skills.name: Data Management with Excel Copilot
skills.description: Utilizing Microsoft 365 Copilot to analyze and manage data in Excel.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Can perform basic data entry and simple analysis using Copilot in Excel.
behavioral_indicators: Uses Copilot to enter data into spreadsheets.
Applies basic formulas suggested by Copilot for data analysis.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Effectively uses Copilot to perform intermediate data analysis and visualization.
behavioral_indicators: Generates charts and graphs using Copilot's visualization tools.
Applies Copilot's advanced formulas for data analysis.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Maximizes Copilot's capabilities for complex data modeling and automation.
behavioral_indicators: Automates data analysis processes using Copilot's advanced features.
Customizes data models with Copilot's assistance for specific business needs.

skills.name: Presentation Design with PowerPoint Copilot
skills.description: Creating and enhancing presentations using Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Uses Copilot to create basic presentations with simple design elements.
behavioral_indicators: Creates slides using Copilot's template suggestions.
Incorporates basic design elements recommended by Copilot.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Enhances presentations with Copilot's advanced design and content features.
behavioral_indicators: Applies Copilot's design suggestions to improve slide aesthetics.
Integrates multimedia elements using Copilot's recommendations.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Utilizes Copilot to create dynamic and interactive presentations.
behavioral_indicators: Customizes interactive elements with Copilot's guidance.
Optimizes presentation flow and engagement using Copilot's advanced features.

domains.name: Communication
domains.description: Skills related to using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams and Outlook to enhance communication.

skills.name: Collaboration with Teams Copilot
skills.description: Using Microsoft 365 Copilot to facilitate collaboration and communication in Teams.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Understands basic communication and collaboration features in Teams with Copilot.
behavioral_indicators: Participates in Teams meetings using Copilot's scheduling features.
Uses Copilot to send messages and share files in Teams.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Effectively uses Copilot to manage and enhance team collaboration.
behavioral_indicators: Organizes team tasks and projects using Copilot's task management tools.
Facilitates team discussions with Copilot's meeting insights and summaries.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Leverages Copilot to optimize team workflows and communication strategies.
behavioral_indicators: Customizes team workflows using Copilot's advanced collaboration features.
Analyzes team communication patterns with Copilot's insights to improve efficiency.

skills.name: Email Management with Outlook Copilot
skills.description: Utilizing Microsoft 365 Copilot to manage and optimize email communication in Outlook.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Can manage basic email tasks using Copilot in Outlook.
behavioral_indicators: Composes and sends emails using Copilot's suggestions.
Organizes emails into folders with Copilot's assistance.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Uses Copilot to enhance email management and communication efficiency.
behavioral_indicators: Applies Copilot's email prioritization features to manage inbox effectively.
Utilizes Copilot's templates for consistent email communication.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Maximizes Copilot's capabilities for strategic email communication and management.
behavioral_indicators: Automates email responses and workflows using Copilot's advanced features.
Analyzes email communication patterns with Copilot's insights for strategic improvements.

domains.name: Data Analysis
domains.description: Skills related to using Microsoft 365 Copilot for data analysis and insights generation.

skills.name: Data Insights with Copilot
skills.description: Using Microsoft 365 Copilot to generate insights and analyze data across platforms.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Understands basic data analysis concepts using Copilot's tools.
behavioral_indicators: Generates simple reports using Copilot's data analysis features.
Identifies trends in data with Copilot's basic insights.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Effectively uses Copilot to perform detailed data analysis and generate insights.
behavioral_indicators: Creates comprehensive reports with Copilot's advanced analysis tools.
Interprets complex data sets using Copilot's insights.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Leverages Copilot to conduct sophisticated data analysis and strategic insights generation.
behavioral_indicators: Customizes data analysis models with Copilot's advanced features.
Develops strategic insights from data using Copilot's comprehensive analysis capabilities.

skills.name: Prompting Best Practices
skills.description: Skills related to effectively using prompts with Microsoft 365 Copilot to achieve desired outcomes.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Understands basic prompting techniques to interact with Copilot.
behavioral_indicators: Uses simple prompts to initiate tasks with Copilot.
Follows Copilot's guidance to complete basic tasks.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Effectively uses advanced prompting techniques to enhance Copilot interactions.
behavioral_indicators: Crafts detailed prompts to achieve specific outcomes with Copilot.
Adapts prompts based on Copilot's feedback to refine task execution.

proficiency_levels.descriptor: Masters prompting techniques to fully leverage Copilot's capabilities for complex tasks.
behavioral_indicators: Designs complex prompt sequences to automate workflows with Copilot.
Optimizes task outcomes by iteratively refining prompts based on Copilot's responses.

objectives.title: Basic Document Creation with Word Copilot
objectives.description: Create and edit documents using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Word.
suggested_activities: Create a new document using Copilot's suggestions for structure and content.
Edit an existing document by applying Copilot's grammar and style recommendations.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can create a document with at least three sections and edit text using Copilot's suggestions.

objectives.title: Advanced Document Formatting with Word Copilot
objectives.description: Enhance document formatting and content creation using Copilot in Word.
prerequisites: Basic Document Creation with Word Copilot
suggested_activities: Apply Copilot's advanced formatting suggestions to improve a document's layout.
Incorporate Copilot's content suggestions to enrich a document with additional information.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can demonstrate improved document layout and enriched content using Copilot's suggestions.

objectives.title: Basic Data Entry and Analysis with Excel Copilot
objectives.description: Perform basic data entry and simple analysis using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Excel.
suggested_activities: Use Copilot to enter data into a spreadsheet and apply basic formulas for analysis.
Create a simple chart using Copilot's visualization tools.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can enter data, apply formulas, and create a chart using Copilot.

objectives.title: Intermediate Data Analysis with Excel Copilot
objectives.description: Perform intermediate data analysis and visualization using Copilot in Excel.
prerequisites: Basic Data Entry and Analysis with Excel Copilot
suggested_activities: Generate charts and graphs using Copilot's visualization tools.
Apply Copilot's advanced formulas to analyze data trends.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can generate visualizations and apply advanced formulas to analyze data.

objectives.title: Basic Presentation Design with PowerPoint Copilot
objectives.description: Create basic presentations using Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint.
suggested_activities: Create a presentation using Copilot's template suggestions.
Incorporate basic design elements recommended by Copilot.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can create a presentation with at least five slides using Copilot's templates and design elements.

objectives.title: Enhanced Presentation Design with PowerPoint Copilot
objectives.description: Enhance presentations with advanced design and content features using Copilot in PowerPoint.
prerequisites: Basic Presentation Design with PowerPoint Copilot
suggested_activities: Apply Copilot's design suggestions to improve slide aesthetics.
Integrate multimedia elements using Copilot's recommendations.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can enhance a presentation with advanced design and multimedia elements using Copilot.

objectives.title: Basic Communication with Teams Copilot
objectives.description: Use Microsoft 365 Copilot to facilitate basic communication and collaboration in Teams.
suggested_activities: Participate in a Teams meeting using Copilot's scheduling features.
Send messages and share files in Teams using Copilot.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can schedule a meeting, send messages, and share files using Copilot in Teams.

objectives.title: Enhanced Collaboration with Teams Copilot
objectives.description: Manage and enhance team collaboration using Copilot in Teams.
suggested_activities: Organize team tasks and projects using Copilot's task management tools.
Facilitate team discussions with Copilot's meeting insights and summaries.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can organize tasks and facilitate discussions using Copilot's tools in Teams.

objectives.title: Basic Email Management with Outlook Copilot
objectives.description: Manage basic email tasks using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook.
suggested_activities: Compose and send emails using Copilot's suggestions.
Organize emails into folders with Copilot's assistance.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can compose, send, and organize emails using Copilot in Outlook.

objectives.title: Enhanced Email Management with Outlook Copilot
objectives.description: Enhance email management and communication efficiency using Copilot in Outlook.
prerequisites: Basic Email Management with Outlook Copilot
suggested_activities: Apply Copilot's email prioritization features to manage inbox effectively.
Utilize Copilot's templates for consistent email communication.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can manage their inbox and use templates for communication using Copilot.

objectives.title: Basic Data Insights with Copilot
objectives.description: Generate basic insights and analyze data using Microsoft 365 Copilot.
suggested_activities: Generate a simple report using Copilot's data analysis features.
Identify trends in data with Copilot's basic insights.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can generate a report and identify data trends using Copilot.

objectives.title: Advanced Data Analysis with Copilot
objectives.description: Perform detailed data analysis and generate insights using Copilot.
suggested_activities: Create comprehensive reports with Copilot's advanced analysis tools.
Interpret complex data sets using Copilot's insights.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can create detailed reports and interpret complex data using Copilot.

objectives.title: Basic Prompting Techniques with Copilot
objectives.description: Use basic prompting techniques to interact with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
suggested_activities: Use simple prompts to initiate tasks with Copilot.
Follow Copilot's guidance to complete basic tasks.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can initiate tasks and complete them using simple prompts with Copilot.

objectives.title: Advanced Prompting Techniques with Copilot
objectives.description: Use advanced prompting techniques to enhance interactions with Microsoft 365 Copilot.
suggested_activities: Craft detailed prompts to achieve specific outcomes with Copilot.
Adapt prompts based on Copilot's feedback to refine task execution.
objectives.success_criteria: Learner can craft and adapt prompts to achieve specific outcomes using Copilot.

assessments.title: Document Creation and Editing with Word Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are tasked with creating a project proposal document for a new client. The document needs to be professional, well-structured, and free of grammatical errors. You will use Microsoft 365 Copilot in Word to assist you in creating and editing this document.
assessments.instructions:
1. Open Microsoft Word and start a new document.
2. Use Copilot to generate a title page with the project name and your contact information.
3. Create an introduction section using Copilot's content suggestions.
4. Add a section for project objectives and use Copilot to enhance the text with advanced formatting.
5. Include a timeline section and use Copilot to format it as a table.
6. Review the entire document and apply Copilot's grammar and style recommendations.
7. Save the document as 'Project_Proposal.docx'.
expected_outputs: A Word document named 'Project_Proposal.docx' with a title page, introduction, objectives, timeline, and no grammatical errors.
assessments.evaluator_guide: Look for a well-structured document with clear sections as outlined in the instructions. The document should be free of grammatical errors and demonstrate the use of Copilot's formatting and content suggestions. Common mistakes include not using Copilot for content generation or failing to apply grammar corrections. A passing submission will have all sections present, formatted correctly, and free of errors.

assessments.title: Data Analysis with Excel Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are responsible for preparing a sales report for the last quarter. The report should include data analysis and visualizations to present to the management team. You will use Microsoft 365 Copilot in Excel to assist with this task.
assessments.instructions:
1. Open Microsoft Excel and create a new spreadsheet.
2. Use Copilot to import sales data from a provided CSV file.
3. Apply basic formulas suggested by Copilot to calculate total sales, average sales, and sales growth.
4. Use Copilot to generate a bar chart visualizing sales by month.
5. Create a summary sheet with Copilot's help, highlighting key insights from the data.
6. Save the spreadsheet as 'Q4_Sales_Report.xlsx'.
expected_outputs: An Excel file named 'Q4_Sales_Report.xlsx' with calculated sales data, a bar chart, and a summary sheet.
assessments.competency_ref: Productivity: Data Management with Excel Copilot
assessments.evaluator_guide: Ensure the spreadsheet includes correctly calculated sales data and a bar chart that accurately represents the data. The summary sheet should highlight key insights and demonstrate the use of Copilot's analysis features. Common pitfalls include incorrect formula application or incomplete data visualization. A passing submission will have all elements present and correctly executed.

assessments.title: Presentation Enhancement with PowerPoint Copilot
assessments.scenario: You need to prepare a presentation for an upcoming conference. The presentation should be visually appealing and include multimedia elements to engage the audience. You will use Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint to enhance your presentation.
assessments.instructions:
1. Open Microsoft PowerPoint and create a new presentation.
2. Use Copilot to select a suitable template for your presentation.
3. Create an introductory slide with Copilot's content suggestions.
4. Add three slides with key points and use Copilot to enhance them with design suggestions.
5. Incorporate a video or image on one of the slides using Copilot's multimedia recommendations.
6. Review the presentation and apply any additional design improvements suggested by Copilot.
7. Save the presentation as 'Conference_Presentation.pptx'.
expected_outputs: A PowerPoint file named 'Conference_Presentation.pptx' with an introductory slide, three key point slides, and multimedia elements.
assessments.competency_ref: Productivity: Presentation Design with PowerPoint Copilot
assessments.evaluator_guide: The presentation should be visually appealing with a consistent design theme. Look for the use of Copilot's template and design suggestions, as well as the inclusion of multimedia elements. Common mistakes include poor slide design or lack of multimedia integration. A passing submission will have a coherent design, engaging content, and multimedia elements effectively used.

assessments.title: Team Collaboration with Teams Copilot
assessments.scenario: Your team is working on a collaborative project, and you need to organize a virtual meeting to discuss progress and next steps. You will use Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams to facilitate this meeting.
assessments.instructions:
1. Open Microsoft Teams and schedule a new meeting using Copilot's scheduling features.
2. Use Copilot to draft and send a meeting agenda to all participants.
3. During the meeting, use Copilot to take notes and highlight key discussion points.
4. After the meeting, use Copilot to generate a summary and share it with the team.
5. Organize follow-up tasks using Copilot's task management tools.
expected_outputs: A scheduled Teams meeting with an agenda, meeting notes, a summary, and organized follow-up tasks.
assessments.evaluator_guide: Check for a properly scheduled meeting with a clear agenda sent to participants. The meeting notes and summary should accurately reflect the discussion, and follow-up tasks should be organized and assigned. Common pitfalls include incomplete notes or lack of task organization. A passing submission will have all elements completed and demonstrate effective use of Copilot's features.

assessments.title: Email Management with Outlook Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are managing a busy inbox and need to prioritize and respond to important emails efficiently. You will use Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook to assist with email management.
assessments.instructions:
1. Open Microsoft Outlook and review your inbox.
2. Use Copilot to prioritize emails based on importance and urgency.
3. Draft responses to the top three priority emails using Copilot's suggestions.
4. Organize emails into folders with Copilot's assistance.
5. Set up a rule using Copilot to automatically sort incoming emails from a specific sender into a designated folder.
expected_outputs: Prioritized emails, drafted responses, organized folders, and an email sorting rule.
assessments.competency_ref: Communication: Email Management with Outlook Copilot
assessments.evaluator_guide: Look for effective prioritization of emails and well-drafted responses using Copilot's suggestions. Emails should be organized into folders, and a sorting rule should be set up correctly. Common mistakes include poor email prioritization or incorrect rule setup. A passing submission will demonstrate efficient email management and correct use of Copilot's features.

assessments.title: Data Insights Generation with Copilot
assessments.scenario: You are tasked with generating insights from a dataset to inform business strategy. You will use Microsoft 365 Copilot to analyze the data and create a report with your findings.
assessments.instructions:
1. Open the provided dataset in Microsoft Excel.
2. Use Copilot to identify key trends and patterns in the data.
3. Generate a report using Copilot's data analysis features, including charts and graphs.
4. Write a summary of insights and recommendations based on the data analysis.
5. Save the report as 'Business_Insights_Report.xlsx'.
expected_outputs: An Excel file named 'Business_Insights_Report.xlsx' with data analysis, charts, graphs, and a summary of insights.
assessments.competency_ref: Data Analysis: Data Insights with Copilot
assessments.evaluator_guide: Ensure the report includes accurate data analysis with clear charts and graphs. The summary should provide actionable insights and recommendations. Common pitfalls include misinterpretation of data or unclear visualizations. A passing submission will have comprehensive analysis and clear, actionable insights.

rubrics.assessment_ref: Document Creation and Editing with Word Copilot

criteria.novice: The title page is missing key elements such as the project name or contact information. Copilot's features were not utilized effectively, resulting in a lack of professionalism.
criteria.competent: The title page includes the project name and contact information, meeting basic professional standards. Copilot was used to generate the content, but the design may lack refinement.
criteria.expert: The title page is professionally designed with all required elements, demonstrating effective use of Copilot's features. The layout is visually appealing and sets a strong first impression.

criteria.novice: The introduction section is poorly structured and lacks coherence. Copilot's content suggestions were not effectively used, resulting in unclear or incomplete information.
criteria.competent: The introduction section is clear and coherent, using Copilot's content suggestions to provide a solid overview. The information is relevant and well-organized.
criteria.expert: The introduction section is exceptionally well-written, with a clear and engaging narrative. Copilot's suggestions were used to enhance clarity and depth, providing a compelling introduction.

criteria.novice: The objectives section is unclear or lacks advanced formatting. Copilot's features were not used to enhance the text, resulting in a basic presentation.
criteria.competent: The objectives section is clear and uses Copilot's advanced formatting features to enhance readability. The content is well-organized and meets professional standards.
criteria.expert: The objectives section is expertly formatted, with clear and concise content. Copilot's features were used to create a visually appealing and highly readable section.

criteria.novice: The timeline section is missing or not formatted as a table. Copilot's assistance was not effectively utilized, leading to a disorganized presentation.
criteria.competent: The timeline section is present and formatted as a table using Copilot's features. The information is clear and logically organized.
criteria.expert: The timeline section is expertly formatted, with a well-structured table that clearly presents the information. Copilot's features were used to enhance clarity and visual appeal.

criteria.novice: The document contains multiple grammatical errors and lacks style consistency. Copilot's grammar and style recommendations were not applied effectively.
criteria.competent: The document is free of grammatical errors and demonstrates consistent style. Copilot's recommendations were applied to ensure clarity and professionalism.
criteria.expert: The document is impeccably written, with no grammatical errors and a sophisticated style. Copilot's recommendations were used to enhance the document's overall quality.

criteria.novice: The sales data is not imported correctly, or the setup is incomplete. Copilot's features were not effectively used, resulting in missing or incorrect data.
criteria.competent: The sales data is correctly imported and set up using Copilot's features. The spreadsheet is organized and ready for analysis.
criteria.expert: The data import and setup are flawlessly executed, with Copilot's features used to ensure accuracy and efficiency. The spreadsheet is well-organized and optimized for analysis.

criteria.novice: Basic formulas are missing or incorrectly applied, leading to inaccurate calculations. Copilot's suggestions were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: Basic formulas are correctly applied to calculate total sales, average sales, and sales growth. Copilot's suggestions were used to ensure accuracy.
criteria.expert: Formulas are expertly applied, with additional insights provided through advanced calculations. Copilot's features were used to enhance the depth and accuracy of the analysis.

criteria.novice: The bar chart is missing or does not accurately represent the data. Copilot's visualization features were not effectively used.
criteria.competent: A bar chart is present and accurately represents the sales data by month. Copilot's features were used to create a clear and informative visualization.
criteria.expert: The bar chart is expertly designed, providing clear insights into the sales data. Copilot's features were used to enhance visual appeal and clarity, with additional visualizations included.

criteria.novice: The summary sheet is missing or lacks key insights. Copilot's analysis features were not effectively utilized, resulting in a superficial summary.
criteria.competent: The summary sheet highlights key insights from the data, using Copilot's analysis features. The information is clear and relevant.
criteria.expert: The summary sheet provides comprehensive insights and recommendations, demonstrating deep analysis. Copilot's features were used to enhance clarity and provide actionable insights.

criteria.novice: A suitable template is not selected, resulting in a disjointed presentation. Copilot's template suggestions were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: A suitable template is selected, providing a consistent design theme. Copilot's suggestions were used to enhance the presentation's visual appeal.
criteria.expert: An exceptional template is selected, enhancing the presentation's visual impact. Copilot's features were used to create a cohesive and professional design.

criteria.novice: Slides lack coherence and design consistency. Copilot's content and design suggestions were not effectively utilized, resulting in a basic presentation.
criteria.competent: Slides are coherent and well-designed, using Copilot's content and design suggestions. The presentation is visually appealing and informative.
criteria.expert: Slides are expertly designed, with engaging content and a professional layout. Copilot's features were used to enhance clarity and visual impact, creating a compelling presentation.

criteria.novice: Multimedia elements are missing or poorly integrated. Copilot's multimedia recommendations were not effectively utilized, resulting in a lack of engagement.
criteria.competent: Multimedia elements are effectively integrated, using Copilot's recommendations. The presentation is engaging and visually appealing.
criteria.expert: Multimedia elements are seamlessly integrated, enhancing the presentation's impact. Copilot's features were used to create a dynamic and engaging experience.

criteria.novice: The presentation lacks polish and professionalism. Copilot's design improvements were not applied, resulting in a basic presentation.
criteria.competent: The presentation is polished and professional, with Copilot's design improvements applied. The overall quality meets professional standards.
criteria.expert: The presentation is of exceptional quality, with a polished and professional finish. Copilot's features were used to enhance every aspect, creating a standout presentation.

criteria.novice: The meeting is not scheduled correctly, or key details are missing. Copilot's scheduling features were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: The meeting is scheduled correctly, with all necessary details included. Copilot's features were used to ensure accuracy.
criteria.expert: The meeting is expertly scheduled, with all details meticulously organized. Copilot's features were used to optimize scheduling and participant engagement.

criteria.novice: The meeting agenda is missing or unclear. Copilot's drafting features were not effectively utilized, resulting in poor communication.
criteria.competent: A clear meeting agenda is drafted and communicated to participants using Copilot's features. The agenda is relevant and well-organized.
criteria.expert: The meeting agenda is comprehensive and effectively communicated, demonstrating strategic use of Copilot's features. The agenda enhances meeting focus and productivity.

criteria.novice: Meeting notes are incomplete or lack key discussion points. Copilot's note-taking features were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: Meeting notes are complete and accurately reflect key discussion points, using Copilot's features. A clear summary is provided.
criteria.expert: Meeting notes are detailed and insightful, capturing all key points and decisions. Copilot's features were used to create a comprehensive and actionable summary.

criteria.novice: Follow-up tasks are disorganized or incomplete. Copilot's task management tools were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: Follow-up tasks are organized and assigned using Copilot's task management tools. The tasks are clear and actionable.
criteria.expert: Follow-up tasks are expertly organized and prioritized, demonstrating strategic use of Copilot's tools. The task management enhances team productivity and accountability.

criteria.novice: Emails are not prioritized effectively, leading to inefficient management. Copilot's prioritization features were not utilized.
criteria.competent: Emails are prioritized based on importance and urgency, using Copilot's features. The prioritization is logical and effective.
criteria.expert: Emails are expertly prioritized, demonstrating strategic use of Copilot's features. The prioritization enhances efficiency and response time.

criteria.novice: Responses to priority emails are poorly drafted or incomplete. Copilot's suggestions were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: Responses to priority emails are well-drafted, using Copilot's suggestions. The responses are clear and professional.
criteria.expert: Responses are expertly crafted, demonstrating effective use of Copilot's suggestions. The responses are articulate and enhance communication.

criteria.novice: Emails are not organized into folders, leading to a cluttered inbox. Copilot's organization features were not utilized.
criteria.competent: Emails are organized into folders using Copilot's features. The organization is logical and enhances inbox management.
criteria.expert: Emails are expertly organized, demonstrating strategic use of Copilot's features. The organization enhances efficiency and accessibility.

criteria.novice: The email sorting rule is missing or incorrectly set up. Copilot's rule setup features were not utilized.
criteria.competent: An email sorting rule is correctly set up using Copilot's features. The rule functions as intended.
criteria.expert: The email sorting rule is expertly set up, demonstrating strategic use of Copilot's features. The rule enhances email management and efficiency.

criteria.novice: Key trends and patterns are not identified, leading to superficial analysis. Copilot's analysis features were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: Key trends and patterns are identified using Copilot's analysis features. The analysis is clear and relevant.
criteria.expert: The analysis is comprehensive, with deep insights into trends and patterns. Copilot's features were used to enhance the depth and accuracy of the analysis.

criteria.novice: Charts and graphs are missing or do not accurately represent the data. Copilot's visualization features were not effectively utilized.
criteria.competent: Charts and graphs are present and accurately represent the data, using Copilot's features. The visualizations are clear and informative.
criteria.expert: Visualizations are expertly designed, providing clear insights into the data. Copilot's features were used to enhance visual appeal and clarity, with additional visualizations included.

criteria.novice: The summary lacks actionable insights and recommendations. Copilot's features were not effectively utilized, resulting in a superficial summary.
criteria.competent: The summary provides actionable insights and recommendations, using Copilot's features. The information is clear and relevant.
criteria.expert: The summary is comprehensive and provides deep insights and strategic recommendations. Copilot's features were used to enhance clarity and provide actionable insights.

criteria.novice: The report lacks polish and professionalism. Copilot's features were not applied, resulting in a basic presentation.
criteria.competent: The report is polished and professional, with Copilot's features applied. The overall quality meets professional standards.
criteria.expert: The report is of exceptional quality, with a polished and professional finish. Copilot's features were used to enhance every aspect, creating a standout report.

item_bank.stem: You are tasked with creating a comprehensive report using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Excel. The report should include data analysis, visualizations, and insights. Describe the steps you would take to utilize Copilot's features to complete this task efficiently. Include how you would customize any data models or visualizations to meet specific business needs.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should detail the use of Copilot to automate data entry, apply advanced formulas, generate visualizations, and customize data models for specific business needs.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Look for a clear explanation of how Copilot's features are used to automate and customize data analysis and visualization. The candidate should demonstrate an understanding of advanced Copilot capabilities.
item_bank.model_answer:
To create a comprehensive report using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Excel, I would begin by importing the necessary data into Excel, using Copilot to assist with data entry and ensure accuracy. I would then leverage Copilot's advanced formula suggestions to perform initial data analysis, identifying key metrics and trends relevant to the business needs.

Next, I would use Copilot's visualization tools to generate charts and graphs that effectively communicate the data insights. This includes selecting appropriate chart types based on the data characteristics and the audience's needs. I would customize these visualizations by adjusting colors, labels, and other design elements to align with the company's branding and presentation standards.

For deeper insights, I would customize data models using Copilot's advanced features. This might involve creating pivot tables or using Power Query to transform data sets. I would ensure that the models are tailored to address specific business questions, such as forecasting sales trends or analyzing customer behavior patterns.

Finally, I would compile the analysis and visualizations into a cohesive report, using Copilot to assist with formatting and ensuring clarity and professionalism in the presentation. Throughout the process, I would iteratively refine the report based on feedback from stakeholders, using Copilot's insights to make data-driven adjustments.

item_bank.stem: Imagine you are preparing a presentation for a high-stakes business meeting using Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint. Describe how you would utilize Copilot to enhance the presentation's design and content, ensuring it is both engaging and informative.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should describe the use of Copilot to apply advanced design suggestions, integrate multimedia elements, and customize interactive features to enhance engagement and information delivery.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the candidate's ability to use Copilot to enhance presentation design and content. Look for specific examples of how Copilot's features are used to improve engagement and information delivery.
item_bank.model_answer:
To prepare a high-stakes business presentation using Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint, I would start by outlining the key points and objectives of the presentation. Using Copilot, I would select a suitable template that aligns with the meeting's tone and audience, ensuring a professional and cohesive look.

I would then leverage Copilot's design suggestions to enhance the visual appeal of each slide. This includes applying advanced formatting options, such as custom color schemes and typography, to ensure consistency and readability. Copilot's recommendations for layout adjustments would help me optimize the placement of text and images for maximum impact.

To make the presentation more engaging, I would integrate multimedia elements such as videos, animations, and interactive charts, using Copilot's guidance to ensure these elements are seamlessly incorporated. Copilot's ability to suggest relevant multimedia content based on the presentation's context would be particularly useful in enhancing the narrative.

Finally, I would use Copilot to customize interactive features, such as hyperlinks and navigation buttons, to facilitate a dynamic presentation flow. This would allow me to adapt the presentation in real-time based on audience feedback and questions, ensuring a more interactive and responsive experience. Throughout the process, I would continuously refine the presentation based on Copilot's feedback and insights, ensuring it is both informative and engaging.

item_bank.stem: You are using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Word to draft a policy document for your organization. Explain how you would leverage Copilot to automate repetitive tasks and customize suggestions to fit the specific needs of the document.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should explain how Copilot can be used to automate repetitive tasks such as formatting and content structuring, and how suggestions can be customized to align with the document's specific requirements.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Assess the candidate's ability to use Copilot to automate tasks and customize suggestions. Look for a clear understanding of how Copilot can enhance document creation and management.
item_bank.model_answer:
When drafting a policy document using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Word, I would begin by outlining the document's structure, including sections such as introduction, policy details, procedures, and appendices. Copilot can assist in automating the formatting of these sections, ensuring consistency in headings, bullet points, and numbering.

To automate repetitive tasks, I would use Copilot's features to apply predefined styles and templates that align with the organization's branding and document standards. This includes setting up automatic table of contents generation and cross-referencing within the document, which saves time and reduces the potential for errors.

Copilot's grammar and style recommendations would be invaluable in ensuring the document's language is clear, concise, and professional. I would customize these suggestions to fit the specific tone and terminology required for the policy document, ensuring it meets the organization's communication standards.

Additionally, I would leverage Copilot's content suggestions to enrich the document with relevant examples, case studies, or legal references that support the policy's objectives. By customizing these suggestions, I can ensure they are directly applicable to the organization's context and enhance the document's credibility and comprehensiveness.

item_bank.stem: You are tasked with managing a team project using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams. Describe how you would use Copilot to organize tasks, facilitate communication, and optimize team workflows.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should detail the use of Copilot to organize tasks, facilitate communication, and optimize workflows, including the use of task management tools and meeting insights.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Look for a comprehensive explanation of how Copilot is used to enhance team collaboration and communication. The candidate should demonstrate an understanding of Copilot's task management and communication features.
item_bank.model_answer:
To manage a team project using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams, I would start by setting up a dedicated channel for the project, ensuring all team members have access and are aware of the project's objectives and timelines. Using Copilot, I would organize tasks by creating a task list or board, assigning responsibilities, and setting deadlines to ensure accountability and progress tracking.

Copilot's task management tools would help me prioritize tasks based on urgency and importance, allowing the team to focus on high-impact activities. I would use Copilot to automate reminders and notifications, ensuring team members are aware of upcoming deadlines and any changes to the project plan.

To facilitate communication, I would leverage Copilot's meeting insights and summaries to keep the team informed of key decisions and action items from meetings. This would include using Copilot to schedule regular check-ins and update meetings, ensuring all team members are aligned and any issues are addressed promptly.

Finally, I would use Copilot to analyze team communication patterns and workflows, identifying areas for improvement and optimizing processes for efficiency. This might involve customizing workflows to reduce bottlenecks or implementing new collaboration tools suggested by Copilot to enhance team productivity and engagement.

item_bank.stem: You are responsible for managing email communication for a busy executive using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook. Explain how you would use Copilot to automate email responses and analyze communication patterns for strategic improvements.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should explain how Copilot can be used to automate email responses and analyze communication patterns, including the use of templates and insights for strategic improvements.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the candidate's ability to use Copilot to enhance email management and communication efficiency. Look for specific examples of automation and analysis features.
item_bank.model_answer:
Managing email communication for a busy executive using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook involves leveraging Copilot's automation and analysis features to ensure efficiency and strategic communication. I would begin by setting up automated email responses for common inquiries, using Copilot's templates to ensure consistency and professionalism in the executive's communication.

Copilot's ability to prioritize emails based on importance and urgency would help me manage the executive's inbox effectively, ensuring critical messages are addressed promptly while less urgent emails are scheduled for later review. I would customize Copilot's prioritization settings to align with the executive's preferences and communication style.

To analyze communication patterns, I would use Copilot's insights to identify trends and areas for improvement. This might involve examining response times, identifying frequently contacted individuals or organizations, and assessing the effectiveness of current communication strategies. Copilot's analysis would provide valuable data to inform strategic decisions, such as adjusting communication priorities or implementing new email management practices.

Finally, I would continuously refine the email management process based on Copilot's feedback and insights, ensuring the executive's communication is both efficient and aligned with their strategic objectives. This iterative approach would help optimize email workflows and enhance overall communication effectiveness.

item_bank.stem: You are tasked with generating strategic insights from a large dataset using Microsoft 365 Copilot. Describe how you would use Copilot's advanced features to customize data analysis models and develop actionable insights.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should detail the use of Copilot to customize data analysis models and generate strategic insights, including the use of advanced analysis tools and interpretation of complex data sets.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Look for a detailed explanation of how Copilot's advanced features are used to customize data analysis and generate insights. The candidate should demonstrate an understanding of strategic insights generation.
item_bank.model_answer:
To generate strategic insights from a large dataset using Microsoft 365 Copilot, I would begin by importing the dataset into Excel or another suitable platform, using Copilot to assist with data cleaning and preparation. This ensures the data is accurate and ready for analysis.

I would then leverage Copilot's advanced analysis tools to explore the dataset, using features such as pivot tables, Power Query, and advanced formulas to identify key patterns and trends. Copilot's ability to suggest relevant analysis techniques based on the dataset's characteristics would be invaluable in this process.

To customize data analysis models, I would use Copilot to create tailored models that address specific business questions or objectives. This might involve segmenting the data by key variables, such as customer demographics or sales regions, to uncover insights that are directly applicable to the organization's strategic goals.

Once the analysis is complete, I would use Copilot to generate comprehensive reports that communicate the insights effectively. This includes using visualizations and narrative elements to highlight key findings and recommendations. Throughout the process, I would iteratively refine the analysis based on Copilot's feedback and insights, ensuring the final output is both actionable and aligned with the organization's strategic objectives.

item_bank.stem: You are preparing to train new employees on using Microsoft 365 Copilot for data analysis. Outline a training session that covers basic prompting techniques and how to use Copilot's insights to complete simple data analysis tasks.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should outline a training session that includes basic prompting techniques and the use of Copilot's insights for simple data analysis tasks, ensuring new employees understand how to interact with Copilot effectively.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the candidate's ability to design a training session that effectively teaches basic prompting techniques and data analysis using Copilot. Look for clarity and comprehensiveness in the training outline.
item_bank.model_answer:
To train new employees on using Microsoft 365 Copilot for data analysis, I would design a training session that introduces them to the basics of interacting with Copilot and using its insights for simple data analysis tasks. The session would begin with an overview of Microsoft 365 Copilot, highlighting its capabilities and benefits for data analysis.

Next, I would introduce basic prompting techniques, demonstrating how to initiate tasks with Copilot using simple prompts. This would include examples of common data analysis tasks, such as generating reports or identifying trends, and how to phrase prompts to achieve desired outcomes.

I would then guide the employees through a hands-on exercise, where they use Copilot to complete a simple data analysis task. This might involve entering data into a spreadsheet, applying basic formulas, and generating a simple report using Copilot's insights. Throughout the exercise, I would provide guidance and feedback, ensuring employees understand how to interact with Copilot effectively.

Finally, I would conclude the session with a discussion on how to interpret Copilot's insights and apply them to real-world scenarios. This would include tips on refining prompts based on Copilot's feedback and how to use insights to inform decision-making. By the end of the session, employees should feel confident in their ability to use Copilot for basic data analysis tasks.

item_bank.stem: You are tasked with optimizing a workflow for a team using Microsoft 365 Copilot. Describe how you would use Copilot's advanced collaboration features to customize workflows and improve team efficiency.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should detail the use of Copilot's advanced collaboration features to customize workflows and improve team efficiency, including the use of insights to analyze and optimize communication patterns.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Look for a comprehensive explanation of how Copilot's advanced features are used to customize workflows and improve team efficiency. The candidate should demonstrate an understanding of workflow optimization.
item_bank.model_answer:
To optimize a workflow for a team using Microsoft 365 Copilot, I would begin by analyzing the current workflow and identifying areas for improvement. Using Copilot's insights, I would assess communication patterns, task management practices, and collaboration tools to pinpoint inefficiencies and bottlenecks.

I would then leverage Copilot's advanced collaboration features to customize workflows that address these inefficiencies. This might involve setting up automated task assignments and reminders, using Copilot to ensure tasks are prioritized and deadlines are met. I would also explore Copilot's recommendations for integrating new collaboration tools or features that enhance team communication and productivity.

To improve team efficiency, I would use Copilot to facilitate regular check-ins and feedback sessions, ensuring team members are aligned and any issues are addressed promptly. Copilot's meeting insights and summaries would be invaluable in keeping the team informed and focused on key objectives.

Finally, I would continuously monitor the optimized workflow using Copilot's insights, making adjustments as needed to ensure ongoing efficiency and effectiveness. This iterative approach would help the team adapt to changing needs and maintain high levels of productivity and engagement.

item_bank.stem: You are responsible for creating a dynamic and interactive presentation using Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint. Explain how you would use Copilot to customize interactive elements and optimize the presentation flow for maximum engagement.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should explain how Copilot is used to customize interactive elements and optimize presentation flow, including the use of advanced features to enhance engagement and information delivery.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Evaluate the candidate's ability to use Copilot to enhance presentation interactivity and flow. Look for specific examples of customization and optimization techniques.
item_bank.model_answer:
To create a dynamic and interactive presentation using Microsoft 365 Copilot in PowerPoint, I would start by outlining the presentation's key messages and objectives. Using Copilot, I would select a template that supports interactive elements, ensuring the design is both engaging and professional.

I would then use Copilot to customize interactive elements such as hyperlinks, navigation buttons, and embedded multimedia. This includes setting up a non-linear presentation flow that allows the audience to explore different sections based on their interests or questions. Copilot's guidance would help me ensure these elements are seamlessly integrated and enhance the overall presentation experience.

To optimize the presentation flow, I would leverage Copilot's advanced features to analyze audience engagement and feedback. This might involve using Copilot's insights to adjust the pacing of the presentation, ensuring key points are emphasized and the audience remains engaged throughout.

Finally, I would continuously refine the presentation based on Copilot's feedback and insights, making adjustments to interactive elements and flow as needed. This iterative approach would help ensure the presentation is both informative and engaging, maximizing its impact on the audience.

item_bank.stem: You are tasked with developing a strategic email communication plan using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook. Describe how you would use Copilot to automate workflows and analyze communication patterns to enhance strategic communication.
item_bank.expected_response_summary: The response should detail the use of Copilot to automate email workflows and analyze communication patterns, including the use of insights to enhance strategic communication.
item_bank.scoring_notes: Look for a comprehensive explanation of how Copilot's features are used to automate workflows and analyze communication patterns. The candidate should demonstrate an understanding of strategic communication enhancement.
item_bank.model_answer:
To develop a strategic email communication plan using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Outlook, I would begin by analyzing the current communication patterns and identifying areas for improvement. Using Copilot's insights, I would assess response times, email volumes, and engagement levels to understand the effectiveness of current strategies.

I would then leverage Copilot to automate email workflows, setting up templates for common communication scenarios and using automated responses for frequently asked questions. This would ensure consistency and efficiency in communication, allowing the team to focus on more strategic tasks.

To enhance strategic communication, I would use Copilot's insights to identify key stakeholders and tailor communication strategies to their needs. This might involve segmenting the audience based on their roles or interests and customizing email content to ensure relevance and impact.

Finally, I would continuously monitor the communication plan using Copilot's insights, making adjustments as needed to ensure ongoing effectiveness. This iterative approach would help the team adapt to changing needs and maintain high levels of engagement and strategic alignment.

blueprint.program_title: Microsoft 365 Copilot User Certification - Foundational Level
blueprint.target_audience: Individuals seeking to enhance their productivity and communication skills using Microsoft 365 Copilot tools.
blueprint.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with Microsoft 365 applications such as Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams, and Outlook.
blueprint.program_overview:
The Microsoft 365 Copilot User Certification at the Foundational Level is designed to equip individuals with essential skills to leverage Microsoft 365 Copilot tools effectively. This certification focuses on enhancing productivity, communication, and data analysis capabilities through the use of AI-driven features in Microsoft 365 applications. Participants will learn to utilize Copilot to streamline document creation, manage data, design presentations, and optimize communication workflows.

The program is structured around three core domains: Productivity, Communication, and Data Analysis. Each domain encompasses specific skills that are critical for maximizing the potential of Microsoft 365 Copilot. From automating repetitive tasks in Word and Excel to enhancing team collaboration in Teams and Outlook, this certification ensures that users can harness the full power of Copilot to achieve their professional goals. By the end of the program, participants will be proficient in using Copilot to generate insights, manage communications, and create compelling presentations, thereby driving efficiency and innovation in their work environments.
domain_summary: Productivity: Master the use of Microsoft 365 Copilot in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint to enhance productivity and automate tasks.
Communication: Enhance collaboration and communication using Microsoft 365 Copilot in Teams and Outlook.
Data Analysis: Utilize Microsoft 365 Copilot for data analysis and insights generation across platforms.
blueprint.assessment_strategy: The assessment strategy for the Microsoft 365 Copilot User Certification is performance-based, focusing on real-world application of skills rather than theoretical knowledge. Candidates will be evaluated through practical tasks that simulate actual workplace scenarios, requiring them to demonstrate proficiency in using Copilot tools across various Microsoft 365 applications. This approach ensures that certified individuals possess the competence to apply their skills effectively in real-world settings, enhancing their productivity and communication capabilities. The assessments are designed to test the ability to automate tasks, generate insights, and optimize workflows using Copilot, reflecting the dynamic and practical nature of the skills being certified.
blueprint.renewal_cadence: Certification renewal is recommended every two years to ensure that certified individuals remain up-to-date with the latest features and enhancements in Microsoft 365 Copilot. This interval allows for the incorporation of new tools and techniques, reflecting the rapid evolution of AI-driven productivity solutions.
